selected_important_turn.text: Got you! I really need firewood to make smores and I don't think we have enough to last the whole night!
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first explicit, persuasive claim for the scarce high-priority resource (firewood) from you. It shifted the interaction away from the opponent's general, cooperative opening into a contested, zero-sum framing and set up direct competition for wood.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: As phrased it is a strong proself influence move that escalates competition before the other party's specific priorities were fully explored. That locked in a zero-sum frame and made later cooperative trades harder to discover. There was an opportunity here to probe, signal willingness to trade, or explore integrative options rather than immediately staking a claim.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Soften the persuasive claim and convert it into information plus a willingness to trade: ask about the other's priorities/constraints, explain why wood matters briefly, and hint that you'd be open to giving up lower-value items in exchange for wood. Emphasize joint problem-solving (e.g., "I really want wood for smores — what would work for you? I'm willing to trade food/water if needed").

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (opens space for tradeoffs and integrative solutions, rather than locking into zero-sum)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (encourages explicit exchange so both sides get compensated rather than one-sided claims)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (reduces early escalation and makes a cooperative deal more likely)

value2reason.Low: I know how to filter from natural sources.
value2reason.Medium: I have hunting skills and some pre made food.
value2reason.High: I do not have tools to cut trees and I need fire to cook.

value2reason.Low: We can drink water from the nearby river although I think bottled water tastes better.
value2reason.Medium: We have good supply of food and we have snacks too. We can fish and roast the fish in the fire. It will a great experience.
value2reason.High: I promised my kids that we are going to make smores and they can stay up all night telling horror stories to each other. our current supply might only last a few hours.

dialogue.text: Hello my friend! Are you ready to go camping?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Getting there, just need some more supplies to be safe.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Got you! I really need firewood to make smores and I don't think we have enough to last the whole night!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I really want the firewood for smores — what would work for you? I'm willing to trade food or water if needed. Let's find a way that works for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value firewood the most for cooking, so I'm open to trading food or water for it. How about 2 firewood packages for 1 food package and 1 water package? That way we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand you value firewood too. Since I really need it for smores and the kids, maybe we could split the firewood 2-1? I’d be happy to give you 1 food package in exchange for 1 firewood package. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate the offer, but I need more firewood for cooking. How about 2 firewood packages for 1 food and 1 water? It would help me prepare meals and keep warm.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I see your need for firewood too. Since I really need it for smores and the kids, maybe we can split the firewood 2-1. I’d be happy to give you 1 food package in exchange for 1 firewood package. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need more firewood for cooking. Let's agree on 2 firewood packages for 1 food and 1 water. That way, we both get what we need for the trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m happy with the deal — 2 firewood for 1 food and 1 water. It works for me and the kids. Let’s confirm and then we can head out!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed! I’ll take 2 firewood, 1 food, and 1 water. You get the remaining 1 firewood, 2 food, and 2 water. Safe travels and enjoy the smores!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
